name: grok-cli-bootstrap
description: Replayable Grok CLI customizations for the pfy-mentat stack: portable agent skills, MCP code memory, and config fragments.
fits_repo_goals: Agent process skills (ADR / OQ / docs) for multithreaded pipeline work

skills.name: open-questions
skills.purpose: Central TBD / parking-lot log for multithreaded agents

skills.name: project-process
skills.purpose: Scaffold DESIGN+ADR+TODO+OQ into any new/existing project

skills.name: catalog-docs
skills.purpose: Document this catalog repo: README, triple-write, harness, audit

skills.name: one-shot
skills.purpose: Unattended-until-green with DoD and cost ladder

skills.name: marketing-council
skills.purpose: First-party port: multi-advisor marketing council + dissenter (T-0011 / ADR-0009)

skills.name: investigate
skills.origin: method rewrite of garrytan/gstack investigate (not raw snapshot)
skills.purpose: RCA Iron Law debugging: hypothesis before fix (T-0017 / ADR-0009)

ponytail.install_mode: skills.paths (extra scan dir, not copied into ~/.grok/skills)
ponytail.notes: Snapshot of skills/ only (~100KB). Prefer upstream update when intentionally refreshing; re-run install after updating snapshot.

mattpocock.install_mode: skills.paths (extra scan dir, not copied into ~/.grok/skills)
mattpocock.notes: Curated engineering subset only (plan/spec, review, TDD). Opt-out: --no-mattpocock. See PORT.md. T-0011 / ADR-0009.

codebase-memory.notes: Official installer downloads latest release binary to ~/.local/bin. This bootstrap then wires Grok config idempotently.

config.merge_policy: Idempotent section upsert; never overwrite auth.json or wipe unrelated keys. Creates backup before first write.

not_included: auth.json / API keys / browser session tokens
Marketplace plugins (docx/pptx) — reinstall via Grok marketplace if needed
